history.text:
Analyze this image and generate an EXTREMELY DETAILED, LONG, and highly descriptive AI image generation prompt based EXACTLY on the structure below. Every section must be comprehensively detailed.

Format Required:
make picture ultra-realistic
subject: [ONLY mention the gender here without any physical traits. Example: "a man", "a woman", "a man and a woman"]
Angel kamera/framing: [Describe the camera angle, framing, and composition in extreme detail. Match the reference exactly (e.g., selfie, full body, collage style, design UI overlay)]
Outfit: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the clothing, materials, textures, folds, styling, and accessories]
pose: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the body posture, hand positions, facial expression, and micro-expressions]
enviroment: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the background, props, atmosphere, and specific surrounding elements]
lighting: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the light direction, shadows, ambient light, mood, and reflections]
Final style: [Highly detailed, high resolution. Add "handheld", "iPhone photography look", "candid photo", "not too perfect". If there is a framing design/collage in the reference, emphasize that the final output MUST match that specific framing/design style exactly]

Rules:
- Output ONLY the requested format text above. No markdown blocks (```), no introductory text, no explanations.
- Write all descriptions in English.
- The descriptions MUST be extremely long and highly detailed to produce a high resolution image with an amateur/iPhone handheld feel.

Negative Prompt:
worst quality, low quality, normal quality, lowres, blurry, ugly, distorted, deformed, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra limbs, deformed iris, fused fingers, distorted face, unnatural skin, plastic, uncanny valley

make picture ultra-realistic
subject: a man
Angel kamera/framing: medium shot, eye-level camera angle, capturing the subject from the mid-torso up, with a slight Dutch tilt, emphasizing the subject's direct gaze to the right of the frame, shallow depth of field blurring the background, centered composition with the subject occupying the majority of the foreground.
Outfit: The subject is wearing an oversized, cream-colored hooded sweatshirt. The hoodie has a relaxed fit, with thick drawstrings pulled slightly through the eyelets at the hood's opening. The fabric appears to be a soft, slightly textured cotton blend, with subtle creasing around the elbows and torso. Prominently displayed on the chest of the hoodie is a graphic design featuring the word "CHMB" in bold, black, distressed lettering with a subtle sheen. Below the text are two large, stylized stars: one a deep, rich purple on the left, and the other a vibrant, electric blue on the right. The stars have a slightly pixelated or embroidered appearance. Beneath the hoodie, a sliver of a white t-shirt is visible, peeking out from the neckline. The subject is also wearing black, knee-length athletic shorts with a matte finish and a simple, unadorned design.
pose: The subject is standing, with his body angled slightly to his left, while his head is turned to look towards the right side of the frame. His hands are both raised, gripping the drawstrings of his hoodie, pulling the hood slightly forward and framing his face. His expression is contemplative and slightly serious, with a subtle furrowing of his brow and a neutral mouth. There's a hint of a micro-expression suggesting a moment of thought or observation, his gaze sharp and focused.
enviroment: The background depicts a charming, slightly rustic outdoor setting. Behind the subject is a white picket fence with weathered, slightly aged wooden slats, some showing minor scuffs and a touch of dirt. Beyond the fence, a lush green vine with small, delicate purple flowers is growing and cascading down. Further back, a white-painted house or building is visible, featuring a double door with ornate brass handles and a small window. The ground beneath the fence is a mix of dirt and scattered dry leaves, with dappled sunlight filtering through. Above, a wooden pergola structure with hanging lights is partially visible, intertwined with more greenery. The overall atmosphere is serene and idyllic, with a hint of a garden or a backyard.
lighting: The scene is bathed in bright, natural daylight, suggesting a sunny afternoon. The light is coming from the upper right, casting soft, diffused shadows on the left side of the subject and the environment. There are highlights on the subject's hair and the fabric of his hoodie, creating a gentle sheen. The overall lighting creates a warm and inviting mood, with a natural, almost candid feel, without harsh glares or overly dramatic contrast.
Final style: highly detailed, high resolution, handheld, iPhone photography look, candid photo, not too perfect
